title: Problem detail
description: Synchronous API error response shape — RFC 9457 application/problem+json standard fields plus SAENA extensions, per ADR-0015.
$comment: compat_class: closed. Authority: approved plan §2 row 4; ADR-0015 (docs/decisions/ADR-0015-canonical-error-model.md) '동기 API 에러 포맷' table — 5 RFC 9457 standard fields (type, title, status, detail, instance) + 4 SAENA extensions (error_code, retryable, trace_id, tenant_id/run_id optional). tenant_id/run_id are $ref'd from common/identifiers/v1 rather than redeclared, per single-authority identifier convention (ADR-0011/ADR-0014).

type.$comment: https://schemas.the-saena.ai/errors/<category>/<code> — non-resolvable identifier namespace, same convention as contract $id (ADR-0011, ADR-0015).

status.$comment: RFC 9457 standard field — HTTP status code.

detail.$comment: RFC 9457 standard field — concrete explanation. PII/secret forbidden by ADR-0015 policy, not schema-enforceable.

instance.$comment: RFC 9457 standard field — request instance identifier URI/ref.

error_code.$comment: saena.<category>.<reason> — same pattern as common/error-detail/v1, per ADR-0015 taxonomy.

trace_id.$comment: 32-hex W3C trace context format — identical to envelope trace_id (ADR-0013), the 3-way correlation key per ADR-0015.

tenant_id.$comment: Optional, when applicable (ADR-0015). Relative path resolves packages/contracts/json-schema/common/problem-detail/v1/ -> ../../identifiers/v1/identifiers.schema.json = packages/contracts/json-schema/common/identifiers/v1/identifiers.schema.json.
